visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Medium: Live-action video. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white cardigan and a pleated skirt, stands in the refrigerated aisle of a Costco warehouse. She holds a large yellow and black product box featuring a bowl of beef soup. She smiles and points toward the product. The setting is bright with artificial store lighting and glass-door refrigerators in the background. (2) The scene cuts to an indoor kitchen/dining area. Two young women sit behind a marble table. One wears a black off-the-shoulder top, and the other wears a zebra-print bucket hat. They hold the same product box and show a single white foil pouch to the camera. They are eating from small bowls with chopsticks and spoons. (3) Close-up shots show a white ceramic bowl filled with dark beef broth, large chunks of beef, and green leafy vegetables. A pair of pink chopsticks lifts a piece of meat to reveal its texture. (4) A digital screen-capture graphic of a YouTube channel interface overlays the screen momentarily, showing subscription buttons. The women continue their discussion, gesturing with their hands. (5) The woman in the hat holds the foil pouch upright and gives a thumbs-up gesture towards the camera. The background remains a modern, dimly lit indoor setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 清燉牛肉湯!. (2) [Subtitle]: 最新上的牛肉湯. (3) [Subtitle]: 這個盒子看起來很好吃. (4) [Subtitle]: 希望內容物也很好吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 裡面有四包. (6) [Subtitle]: 回去煮看看. (7) [Variety]: 珍苑 清燉牛肉湯!. (8) [Subtitle]: 429元 共四包. (9) [Subtitle]: 每包500公克. (10) [Subtitle]: 所以這裡有2公斤喔. (11) [Subtitle]: 我們之所以介紹 是因為吃完之後發現 真的太好吃了. (12) [Variety]: 好市多四月新品!. (13) [Slogan]: 去訂閱我們YouTube 可可酒精頻道. (14) [Subtitle]: 他的湯頭真的好厲害. (15) [Variety]: 牛肉湯火鍋. (16) [Variety]: 牛肉湯泡飯!. (17) [Variety]: 牛肉麵. (18) [Subtitle]: 它的湯頭像是現煮一樣 非常地甘醇美好. (19) [Subtitle]: 牛肉塊都給得非常有誠意. (20) [Subtitle]: 最重要的是它的口感非常地柔嫩. (21) [Subtitle]: 所以老人小孩吃也容易方便. (22) [Subtitle]: 一袋107元. (23) [Subtitle]: 然後算是一人份 我覺得非常方便. (24) [Subtitle]: 它可以常溫保存. (25) [Subtitle]: 所以平常放在家裡也很方便. (26) [Variety]: 推推.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with long black hair in a white cardigan/grey skirt, the other in a zebra-patterned bucket hat and white/black top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a bright warehouse store (Costco) refrigerated aisle with egg cartons. Second scene is a modern indoor kitchen/dining area with a marble tabletop and minimalist decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice begins narrating with high arousal, accompanied by a bright 'pop' sound effect. Fast-tempo electronic-pop music with a steady 4/4 beat sits clearly in the background. (2) A 'whoosh' transition sound triggers a new phase as the speaker's vocal tone shifts to an informative, enthusiastic narrative style. The music maintains energy with synthetic percussion. (3) A distinct 'ding' bell sound effect coincides with the mention of product pricing. The speaker maintains rapid articulation clarity (level 5) without significant pauses. (4) A 'sparkle' or 'magic' sound effect plays over the BGM during a call to action regarding a social media channel, followed by another 'pop' sound. (5) As the narration details the broth's texture, subtle 'clink' sounds from utensils are audible under the primary voice. The music remains a consistent high-energy bed. (6) A series of 'pop' SFX and a final energetic vocal sign-off with a rising intonation close the track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Detailed Tasting/Review -> Practical Tips -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a detailed and positive review of a specific beef soup product found at Costco, encouraging viewers to purchase it and subscribe to the creators' YouTube channel for more recommendations.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, pricing information, and repeated verbal recommendations to 'try it'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency social-native editing techniques, such as rapid cuts and variety-show style text overlays, to maintain high viewer engagement.
